subtasks.description: Query SAM database for Microsoft licensing inventory: product SKUs, licensed user counts per product, license types, and license assignment dates
Query consumption facts warehouse for active Microsoft users: product-level active user counts, consumption metrics, usage intensity, and period aggregations

Reconcile licensed users (SAM) vs active users (consumption facts). Calculate provisioning ratio, identify over-provisioned (licensed > active) and under-provisioned (active > licensed) products. Generate classification of provisioning posture (optimal, over, under) and recommendations

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks with minimal decomposition: (1) SAM query for licensing snapshot (mid — aggregation over license records and products), (2) SQL consumption query for active users metrics (mid — multi-table join across users and consumption facts), (3) cross_recon at frontier tier because it must reconcile two heterogeneous sources (MongoDB state vs SQL facts), compute ratios and deltas, classify over/under-provisioning across products, and generate actionable remediation recommendations — this requires synthesis, logic, and inference across signals. Separate subtasks are required because SAM and consumption facts are distinct data sources; they cannot be queried in a single call. No policy_action needed because this is analytical reconciliation and posture classification, not governance approval.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) as active_users, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as total_active_seats, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as total_consumption_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_date) as usage_days, ROUND(SUM(cf.amount_usd)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id), 0), 2) as spend_per_user, ROUND(SUM(cf.daily_active_seats)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_date), 0), 2) as avg_daily_seats, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Microsoft' AND cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY cf.product, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year DESC, cf.fiscal_quarter DESC, total_consumption_usd DESC

output.raw_output: {"reconciled":[{"entity_key":"M365-E5","mongo_value":{"license_id":"LIC-MS-001","product":"M365-E5","publisher":"Microsoft","contract_value_usd":2400000,"licensed_seat_count":5000,"cost_per_seat_usd":480,"assigned_user_count":4200,"active_assignments":3800,"status":"active","criticality_tier":"tier1"},"sql_value":{"product":"M365-E5","active_users":3650,"total_active_seats":328500,"total_consumption_usd":1752000,"usage_days":90,"spend_per_user":480.00,"avg_daily_seats":3650.00,"fiscal_year":2024,"fiscal_quarter":"Q4"},"classification":"over","provisioning_ratio":0.73,"gap":1350,"recommendation":"Reduce licensed seats by ~1000-1350 at next renewal; reclaim 400 assigned-but-inactive seats immediately"},{"entity_key":"PowerBI-Pro","mongo_value":{"license_id":"LIC-MS-002","product":"PowerBI-Pro","publisher":"Microsoft","contract_value_usd":120000,"licensed_seat_count":1000,"cost_per_seat_usd":120,"assigned_user_count":1000,"active_assignments":980,"status":"active","criticality_tier":"tier2"},"sql_value":{"product":"PowerBI-Pro","active_users":1450,"total_active_seats":130500,"total_consumption_usd":174000,"usage_days":90,"spend_per_user":120.00,"avg_daily_seats":1450.00,"fiscal_year":2024,"fiscal_quarter":"Q4"},"classification":"under","provisioning_ratio":1.45,"gap":-450,"recommendation":"Expand license pool by ~450 seats; investigate shadow IT or shared-account usage driving overage"},{"entity_key":"Azure-DevOps","mongo_value":{"license_id":"LIC-MS-003","product":"Azure-DevOps","publisher":"Microsoft","contract_value_usd":90000,"licensed_seat_count":750,"cost_per_seat_usd":120,"assigned_user_count":720,"active_assignments":710,"status":"active","criticality_tier":"tier2"},"
